zh.Neundorf, Annaberg, Chemnitz, Saxony, Ge: 德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格多福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Valten Bauer於1470年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格安納貝格格盧巴賀 史蒂芬 艾爾茲格比格盧巴賀時，他的父親Valten Bauer35歲，母親Anna Eva Carrington31歲。他於1485年與Mrs. Valten Bauer在德國薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格多福結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1510年在德國巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 蒂賓根德頓豪森享年40歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Valten Bauer于1470年出生在德国薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格安納貝格格盧巴賀 史蒂芬 艾爾茲格比格盧巴賀时，他的父亲Valten Bauer35岁，母亲Anna Eva Carrington31岁。他于1485年与Mrs. Valten Bauer在德国薩辛可萊斯 安納貝格多福结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1510年在德国巴登-爾特波格藍德可萊斯 蒂賓根德頓豪森享年40岁。

nameMeanings.name: Bauer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Erwin, Fritz, Helmut, Heinz, Manfred, Franz, Gerhard, Johannes, Wolfgang.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): status name for a peasant or nickname meaning ‘neighbor, fellow citizen’, from Middle High German (ge)būr, Middle Low German būr, denoting an occupant of a būr, a small dwelling or building. This word later fell together with Middle High German būwære, an agent noun from Old High German būwan ‘to cultivate’, later also (at first in Low German dialects) ‘to build’. The precise meaning of the Jewish surname, which is of later formation, is unclear. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), the Netherlands, Denmark, Hungary, Poland, Czechia, Slovakia, Croatia, and Slovenia, often as a translation into German of corresponding Slavic status names or surnames.

variants.name: Agricola
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Dutch Algert, Cornelis.  German Aloys, Otto.
German and Dutch: humanistic surname, a translation into Latin of German   Bauer   and Dutch   Boer   ‘farmer’.

variants.name: Bauerlein
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerhard, Gunther.
German (Bäuerlein): standardized diminutive of Bauer , originally occurring in southern dialects as Bäuerle (see Bauerle ), Beuerle , and Beyerle .

variants.name: Baur
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Kurt, Uli, Ulrich, Alfons, Arno, Erwin, Friedrich, Fritz, Urs, Wilhelm, Wolfgang.
South German: variant of   Bauer   ‘peasant’ or ‘neighbor, fellow citizen’. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine).

variants.name: Ankenbauer
meanings: South German (mainly Bavaria): from Middle High German anken ‘butter’ + būr ‘farmer’ (see Bauer ), hence an occupational name for a dairy farmer. Alternatively, the first element may be a topographic term, Anke, meaning ‘slight rise in the ground’, or an old term ank ‘watery’, hence ‘farmer with fields in a wet area’.

variants.name: Bierle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto.
South German: from a diminutive of Bauer , an unrounded form of Alemannic Bürle (compare Buehrle ).

variants.name: Beurer
meanings: South German: habitational name for someone from any of various places called Beuren, from Old High German būr ‘small dwelling’ (see Bauer ).

variants.name: Bauerle
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bernhard, Albrecht, Helmut, Horst, Lothar, Merwin, Otto.
South German (Bäuerle): from a Swabian diminutive of Bauer .

variants.name: Bauers
meanings: German: variant of Bauer , with post-medieval excrescent -s, or from a first part of an original compound name (e.g. Bauersfeld ).

variants.name: Beuerle
meanings: South German: diminutive of   Bauer  .

variants.name: Baumann
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Erwin, Otto, Gerhard, Ernst, Heinz, Guenter, Armin, Dieter, Erna, Friedrich.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): status name for a peasant or a nickname meaning ‘neighbor, fellow citizen’, from Middle High German būman, German Baumann ‘peasant’ (see Bauer ). This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine), the Netherlands, Denmark, Poland, and some other European countries. Compare Bauman and Bowman .

nameMeanings.name: Valten
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of   Walter .

en.lifeSummary: When Valten Bauer was born in 1470, in Grumbach, Grumbach im Erzgebirge, Annaberg, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany, his father, Valten Bauer, was 35 and his mother, Anna Eva Carrington, was 31. He married Mrs. Valten Bauer in 1485, in Neundorf, Kreis Annaberg, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1510, in Dettenhausen, Tübingen, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, at the age of 40.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Valten Bauer est né en 1470, à Grumbach, Grumbach im Erzgebirge, Annaberg, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Valten Bauer, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Anna Eva Carrington, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Valten Bauer en 1485, à Neundorf, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1510, à Dettenhausen, Landkreis Tübingen, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, à l’âge de 40 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Valten Bauer(이)가 1470년 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 애나버그 그럼바치 임 르즈그비르지 그럼바치에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Valten Bauer(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Anna Eva Carrington(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1485년 독일 작센 크레이스 애나버그 니우도르프에서 Mrs. Valten Bauer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1510년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 랜드크레이스 트u빙 데텐하우센에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Valten Bauer nasceu em 1470, em Grumbach, Grumbach im Erzgebirge, Annaberg, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemanha, seu pai, Valten Bauer, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Anna Eva Carrington, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Valten Bauer em 1485, em Neundorf, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1510, em Dettenhausen, Landkreis Tübingen, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, com 40 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Valten Bauer родился в 1470 г. в местности грумбач, грумбач им эрзгебирдж, аннабирг, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Valten Bauer было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Eva Carrington, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Valten Bauer в 1485 г. в местности неундорф, крис аннабирг, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1510 г. в местности деттенаусен, ландкрис тuбинген, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия в возрасте 40 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Valten Bauer nació en 1470, en Grumbach, Grumbach im Erzgebirge, Annaberg, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemania, su papá, Valten Bauer, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Anna Eva Carrington, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Mrs. Valten Bauer en 1485, en Neundorf, Kreis Annaberg, Sachsen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1510, en Dettenhausen, Landkreis Tübingen, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, a la edad de 40 años.
